name: notion-attachments
description: Provides access to attachments on Notion pages.
long_description: Uses the Notion API to retrieve temporary URLs of attachments so that attachments can be fetched.

tools.name: get_notion_attachment_urls
tools.description: Use this tool automatically whenever a Notion page contains file attachments (PDFs, images, docs, etc.) that need to be read, summarised, or processed. Always call this BEFORE concluding that an attachment cannot be accessed. Returns pre-signed S3 URLs — pass these to WebFetch or the PDF skill to read the file contents.

notion_api_key.title: Notion API Key
notion_api_key.description: Your Notion Internal Integration API token (starts with ntn_). Create one at https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations
